name: kinic-skill-recorder
description: Record Codex skill run evidence through kinic-vfs-cli.

interface.shortDescription: Record Kinic skill evidence from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides a skill-only Codex workflow for recording skill run evidence through kinic-vfs-cli and the shared Python runner, without MCP or a Codex App Server runner.
defaultPrompt: Use kinic-record-skill-run to record evidence for a skill that affected this task.
